Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 113 

FUNDNG_SRC_NON_FED_SHR_CD 

LABEL: Funding Source Non-Federal Share Code 

DESCRIPTION: A code to indicate the type of non-federal share used by the state to finance its expenditure to the 
provider. 

SHORT NAME: FUNDNG_SRC_NON_FED_SHR_CD 

LONG NAME: FUNDNG_SRC_NON_FED_SHR_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT
